phases.name: PROJECAO
phases.description: Validacao de 19,224 formulas da PROJECAO + dados SAP 2026

phases.name: FATURAMENTO
phases.description: Merge SAP+Mercos, validacao contra PAINEL, 11 armadilhas Mercos
phases.key_achievement: 537 clientes merged, 11/11 armadilhas validated, PAINEL R$ 2,156k scope mismatch documented

phases.name: TIMELINE MENSAL
phases.description: Vendas meses preenchidas, ABC recalc, cross-check DRAFT 1
phases.key_achievement: 537/537 cross-check match, 0 ABC mismatches, 10/10 derived fields

phases.name: LOG COMPLETO
phases.description: 20,830 registros LOG (Funil + Deskrio + SAP synthetic), dedup, normalizacao

phases.name: DASHBOARD
phases.description: DASH tab com 3 blocos, 304 formulas, 6 KPIs, produtividade por consultor
phases.key_achievement: 22/22 checks PASS, 304 formulas, COUNTIFS sobre LOG

phases.name: E-COMMERCE
phases.description: ETL dados e-commerce B2B, matching 5 niveis, populacao DRAFT 1
phases.key_achievement: 1,075 registros, 64.6% match rate, DRAFT 1 cols 15-20 populated

phases.name: REDES & FRANQUIAS
phases.description: REDES_FRANQUIAS_v2 tab, 20 redes + SEM GRUPO, 280 formulas, RANK

phases.name: COMITE & METAS
phases.description: COMITE tab 342 formulas, 5 blocos, RATEIO toggle, filtros VENDEDOR/PERIODO
phases.key_achievement: 342 formulas, META MES = annual/12, RATEIO 3-way toggle

phases.name: BLUEPRINT V2
phases.description: CARTEIRA 134,092 formulas + REGRAS + DRAFT 1/2 + 4 AGENDAs, intelligence cols
phases.key_achievement: 134,092 CARTEIRA formulas, SCORE RANKING 6 fatores, 4 AGENDAs com SORTBY+FILTER

phases.name: VALIDACAO FINAL
phases.description: Auditoria abrangente, remediacao, delivery report, teste Excel real

VAL-01.name: Formula Error Scan
VAL-01.description: 0 erros de formula em 154,302 formulas across 13 tabs

VAL-02.name: Faturamento Structural Integrity
VAL-02.notes: Structure validated: DRAFT 1 has monthly data, CARTEIRA FATURAMENTO references DRAFT 1, PROJECAO REALIZADO uses SUM. PAINEL R$ 2,156,179 mismatch is pre-existing Phase 2 FAIL_WITH_NOTES (source scope mismatch: SAP R$ 2,089k, Merged R$ 2,493k). Computed totals require Excel recalculation (openpyxl cannot recalc).

VAL-03.name: Two-Base Architecture
VAL-03.description: Two-Base Architecture 100% compliant (20,830 LOG records, 0 monetary violations)

VAL-04.name: CNPJ Validation
VAL-04.description: CNPJ 14 digitos, 0 duplicatas, 554 DRAFT 1 = 554 CARTEIRA (1:1 match)

VAL-05.name: Tab Inventory
VAL-05.notes: 13 tabs present (ROADMAP says 14, actual V13 has 13). This is a documented requirement update -- all functional requirements from Phases 1-9 are satisfied with 13 tabs.

VAL-06.name: Excel Real Test
VAL-06.description: Requires opening CRM_VITAO360_V13_FINAL.xlsx in Excel 365 and running checklist
VAL-06.notes: Plan 10-03 will provide the Excel test checklist

known_limitations: AGENDA tabs require Excel 365 or 2021+ (SORTBY/FILTER dynamic arrays)
PAINEL R$ 2,156,179 does not match any single data source (documented Phase 2 FAIL_WITH_NOTES)
openpyxl-generated file needs first Excel open to recalculate all formulas
auto_filter absent until first Excel save (openpyxl limitation)
JAN/25 + FEV/25 hidden in totals (R$ 103,893.89) -- no column but included in ABC

regra_principal.description: 4 AGENDA tabs generate daily prioritized tasks per consultant (40-60 items) using SCORE ranking from 6 weighted factors (URGENCIA 30%, VALOR 25%, FOLLOWUP 20%, SINAL 15%, TENTATIVA 5%, SITUACAO 5%), with SORTBY+FILTER for automatic sorting by score descending

excel_requirements.recommended: Excel 365 or Excel 2021+ (all features including AGENDA dynamic arrays)

next_steps: Plan 10-03: Open CRM_VITAO360_V13_FINAL.xlsx in Excel 365 and run VAL-06 checklist
First open will trigger formula recalculation (may take 30-60 seconds)
Verify AGENDA tabs populate with daily prioritized tasks
Save file in Excel to restore auto_filter
